    • Method Detail

      • getQueue

        public static QueueCallflow getQueue​(String id)
        Returns a named queue.
        Parameters:
        id - name of the queue
        Returns:
        the queue

      • initialize

        public void initialize​(QueueConfig config)
        This is an overloaded method invoked by the base class 'SettingsManager'. It creates instances of ConcurrentLinkedDeque to be used as the actual FIFO queues. Since this method may be called multiple times, care is taken not to clobber any existing queues.
        Overrides:
        initialize in class SettingsManager<QueueConfig>
        Parameters:
        config -
